case_title: JOSHI, KOMAL VS LAZARUS DATA RECOVERY

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO WILLIAM K. CHANG PRESIDENT LAZARUS DATA RECOVERY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-15-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-25-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 10/25/06 AT 10:00 A.M. IF NO APPEARANCES, DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. MEDAIATED SETTLEMENT
BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. DEFT PAID $1530.00 AND $1,000.00 ON 4/16/07.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LAZARUS DATA RECOVERY
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY WILLIAM K CHANG HEARING SET FOR MAR-05-2007 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,448.78 FILED BY JOSHI, KOMAL AS TO DEFENDANT LAZARUS DATA RECOVERY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LAZARUS DATA RECOVERY HEARING SET FOR JAN-03-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAR-05-2007, CONTINUED FROM MAR-05-2007 TO APR-16-2007 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506 AS TO THIRD PARTY WILLIAM K CHANG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOSHI, KOMAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAZARUS DATA RECOVERY $2,625.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,685.00, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR $225 PREVIOUSLY CREDITED TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
OEX IS FOR A THIRD PARTY; 1ST OEX WAS ISSUED TO THE COMPANY, AND CHANGED TO A 3RD PARTY; THAT'S WHY 2ND OEX IS EXEMPT. ONLY ONE OEX IS ISSUED.
